title: Two way sync for Monday and Asana
excerpt: Right now, the integration with Monday and Asana is only one way (from Asana into Monday). Please make it two way! The one way is not helpful to us. We also need it to sync Monday items AND sub-items, please!

posts.author: MrsBritWalk (Britney Walker)
posts.cookedHtml: Right now, the integration with Monday and Asana is only one way (from Asana into Monday). Please make it two way! The one way is not helpful to us. We also need it to sync Monday items AND sub-items, please!
